home.name: Rongfeng Cheng
home.subtitle: Junior at South China University of Technology, building interpretable AI systems for healthcare. From hospital AI internships to knowledge graph + LLM research — I turn clinical data into explainable, interactive AI.

health_ai.title: Health AI
health_ai.description: Building proactive health companions and clinical decision support systems that bridge LLMs with medical knowledge graphs.

knowledge_graphs.title: Knowledge Graphs
knowledge_graphs.description: Designing domain KGs with entity resolution, relation extraction, and explainable reasoning over real clinical datasets.

interpretable_ml.title: Interpretable AI
interpretable_ml.description: Making AI decisions transparent — mapping ML model predictions onto knowledge graphs for clinical traceability.

about.title: About Me
about.bio_p1: I'm a junior undergraduate at South China University of Technology (SCUT), majoring in Big Data Management and Application. My research sits at the intersection of healthcare and interpretable AI — I believe medical AI systems must not only be accurate but also explainable to clinicians and patients.
about.bio_p2: My journey started at the AI Research Institute of Guangdong No. 2 Provincial People's Hospital, where I worked on LLM fine-tuning and knowledge graph construction for cardiovascular diseases. Since then, I've built multiple systems that combine large language models with structured medical knowledge — from a standardized patient Q&A system processing 8,000 clinical cases to a myocardial ischemia knowledge graph with XGBoost-based reasoning.
about.bio_p3: I'm also passionate about building AI tools that feel human. Viora, my AI health companion, proactively checks in on users through natural conversation rather than forms and checklists. Portraiture explores whether we can build digital twins from chat logs that are evidence-backed and interpretable rather than black-box.
about.ri_1: Explainable AI for clinical decision support
about.ri_3: Conversational AI for health and well-being
about.ri_4: LLM agent architectures and persona modeling

hospital.title: AI Research Institute, Guangdong No. 2 Provincial People's Hospital
hospital.desc_1: Participated in LLM fine-tuning, question-answering testing, prompt design, data collection and preprocessing, data annotation, and product prototype development.
hospital.desc_2: Conducted in-depth research on the application of 'LLM + Knowledge Graph' in the medical domain.

startup.title: Yunzhan Zhichuang Technology Co.
startup.desc_1: Affiliated startup of the hospital, working on productizing AI research outputs.

bigdata_assoc.desc_1: Co-founded the association and led recruitment, team building, and organizational management.
